title: QUIZ — battle intro (above the fold)
subtitle: The quiz reuses lesson chrome but pivots into a head-to-head combatant layout. Color codes the two sides.

regions.label: STEPPER · 1 of 1
regions.note: Single-phase quiz = one node. Same dot component as the lesson stepper.

regions.label: PAGE HEADER
regions.note: 'FINAL CHALLENGE' eyebrow tells the user: this is the boss room.

regions.label: RED TEAM
regions.note: Pink accent rule on the LEFT edge. Pink kicker label = attacker role. Mirrors the blue card on the right.

regions.label: BLUE TEAM
regions.note: Cyan accent rule on the RIGHT edge. Same card silhouette = equal billing. 'VS' badge sits exactly between them on the grid axis.
